name: easyeda-agent-mcp-server
description: Bug-fix fork of the EasyEDA Pro MCP bridge. Resolves silent BOM wipes, dead copper to SMD pads and five-minute netlist hangs.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:mcp && npm run typecheck:extension
scripts.test: node --require ts-node/register --test tests/roundtrip.test.ts tests/geometry.test.ts tests/symbol-editor.test.ts tests/schematic-reader-flip.test.ts tests/pcb-params.test.ts tests/sch-netlist-parse.test.ts tests/bridge-daemon.test.ts
